name: per_team_pass_play single-year with partial weeks (non-wrap partial-scope regression)
description: Regression: when a player-cell view selects a single year with a partial-week subset (weeks 1-4 of 2024) and no year split, the standard non-wrap path must emit the nfl_week_id IN-list on both the (off)-grain denominator CTE and the numerator aggregate. apply_play_by_play_column_params_to_query routes time predicates through apply_scope_to_query (b4e419f3); this test pins that single-year + partial-week scope is preserved on both arms so the denominator does not silently sum weeks 5+. Companion to per-team-pass-play-multi-year-no-split-partial-week.json (wrap path).
expected_query: with "tdbaef464b2ddde6c69f67c1521dbeb50" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off", COUNT(*) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "play_type" = 'PASS' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2024_REG_WEEK_1', '2024_REG_WEEK_2', '2024_REG_WEEK_3', '2024_REG_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2024) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year"), "rate_aggregate_7b430f2e30af" as materialized (select nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.comp = true THEN nfl_plays.recv_yds ELSE 0 END) AS m_33f2f8aa0da1 from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."nfl_week_id" in ('2024_REG_WEEK_1', '2024_REG_WEEK_2', '2024_REG_WEEK_3', '2024_REG_WEEK_4') and "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024) and not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2024_REG_WEEK_1', '2024_REG_WEEK_2', '2024_REG_WEEK_3', '2024_REG_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by nfl_plays.trg_pid) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_7b430f2e30af.m_33f2f8aa0da1) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(tdbaef464b2ddde6c69f67c1521dbeb50.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS rec_yds_from_plays_0, "player"."pos" from "player" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2024 left join "tdbaef464b2ddde6c69f67c1521dbeb50" on "tdbaef464b2ddde6c69f67c1521dbeb50"."off" = "player_year_teams"."team" left join "rate_aggregate_7b430f2e30af" on "rate_aggregate_7b430f2e30af"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.pos IN ('WR') group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
